title: Real Travel
description: Make your world more interesting to explore
body:
The main purpose of this modpack is to increase the player's interest in exploring the world. It focuses on improving the generation of the world by adding new biomes, structures and also improving vanilla structures. I tried to make sure that everything remained in the vanilla style.

In addition, you can find many mods that improve optimization, atmosphere, and more. 
The mechanics of opening the portal to the end have also been changed. Now to open it, you need to find 12 different eyes most of which can be found in the dungeons. To make it more convenient to loot the dungeons, a backpack mod was added, you don't have to worry about the lack of space in your inventory.

This modpack has Distant Horizons disabled by default, but you can always enable it in the settings. If you want to play with distant horizons, then I recommend setting the render distance 8 chunks. I also recommend preloading chunks using the chunky mod. For example, it can be done this way: /chunky start minecraft:overworld square 0 0 2000 2000 => /chunky continue. This will make distant horizons work more correctly.

Authorship:

SuperBetterGrass: by dimadencep [[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass/download/4744836](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass/download/4744836)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass)
